kw.name: Open Application
kw.doc: Opens a new application to the given Appium server. Capabilities of appium server, Android and iOS, Please check https://appium.io/docs/en/2.19/guides/caps/ | *Option* | *Man.* | *Description* | | remote_url | Yes | Appium server url | | alias | No | alias |

test.name: Valid Login

kw.name: Login Success
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'admin' into text field 'xpath=//android.widget.EditText[@content-desc="Username input field"]'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'password123' into text field 'xpath=//android.widget.EditText[@content-desc="Password input field"]'
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Element
Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.

kw.msg: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Back to login button"]' did not match any elements.
kw.status: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Back to login button"]' did not match any elements.
ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Back to login button"]' did not match any elements.

test.status: ValueError: Element locator 'xpath=//android.widget.Button[@content-desc="Back to login button"]' did not match any elements.

test.name: Invalid Login

kw.name: Login Failed
Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'wrong' into text field 'xpath=//android.widget.EditText[@content-desc="Username input field"]'

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into the log.
